overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town. The character traverses bustling market streets with half-timbered houses, passes through a shadowed stone gate, and exits to a rural area with a wooden bridge over water.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval market street with canal and timber-framed buildings

events.description: slight turn to the right while navigating past a wooden cart on the street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the market district, passing wooden stalls and villagers

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing near a market stall

entered.detail: narrow water canal running alongside the cobblestone street with wooden retaining walls
traditional medieval building with exposed wooden beams and white plaster walls
market stall with canvas awning displaying various goods
large wooden cart with canvas cover parked on the cobblestones
tall stone defensive tower with conical roof marking the city gate entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit medieval market street lined with half-timbered houses. A canal runs along the right side while market stalls and wooden carts occupy the street edges. The stone gate tower looms in the distance as villagers walk about, and the camera follows Geralt's steady pace through the cobblestone thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone city gate tunnel with portcullis and campfire

events.description: entering the shadowed stone gate structure from the sunlit market street
passing a burning campfire inside the gate tunnel, creating warm flickering light against the stone walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the gate passage, passing guards and villagers near the campfire

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing watch near the stone wall

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the tunnel entrance with heavy wooden doors
metal grate gate raised above the passage opening
burning campfire with wooden stools arranged around it for warmth
construction scaffolding along the interior stone wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the shadowed stone gate tunnel. Geralt walks beneath the heavy portcullis and past a warming campfire where guards stand watch. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dim, enclosed shadows as he moves through the ancient stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural outskirts outside the city walls approaching a river bridge

events.description: exiting the gate into the bright open countryside with visible sky and distant hills
approaching the wooden bridge over the river, ground transitioning from cobblestone to wooden planks

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path outside the city walls, passing a child playing near the wall

notable_agents.action: child crouching and playing near the base of the stone wall

entered.detail: tall defensive stone wall of the city with weathered blocks
small wooden houses with thatched roofs scattered in the rural landscape
wooden footbridge with railings crossing the river
flowing river water visible alongside the path and under the bridge

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the gate into the bright open countryside. The city wall runs along the right while rural cottages dot the left side of the path. He approaches a wooden bridge crossing the river as the environment opens up to fields and distant forests, with the lighting returning to full natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge over river leading to rural village

events.description: stepping onto the wooden bridge from the cobblestone path, surface changing to wooden planks

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden bridge, heading toward the rural village visible on the other side

entered.detail: rough wooden railings along both sides of the bridge
dense tree line visible beyond the village in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses the wooden bridge over the flowing river. The bridge planks replace the cobblestones underfoot as he heads toward the rural village with forested hills in the distance. The camera follows him across the span, with wooden railings visible on both sides and the water flowing beneath.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling medieval market street through a shadowed fortification and out into a bright rural landscape. It begins by following Geralt along a sunlit cobblestone thoroughfare lined with half-timbered houses and market stalls, moving steadily toward a looming stone gate tower. As he enters the gate, the lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dim, enclosed shadows beneath a heavy portcullis and past a flickering campfire. The scene then opens up as Geralt emerges from the tunnel into the natural light of the countryside, passing city walls and rural cottages before approaching a river. Finally, the camera follows him as he leaves the stone path behind to cross a wooden bridge, heading toward a distant village nestled against forested hills.
